query:
SELECT
                COALESCE(db.id, di.id) as "id!",
                d.uploaded
            FROM
                "Document" d
            LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
                SELECT
                    i.id
                FROM
                    "DocumentInstance" i
                WHERE
                    i."documentId" = d.id
                ORDER BY
                    i."createdAt" ASC
                LIMIT 1
            ) di ON d."fileType" IS DISTINCT FROM 'docx'
            LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
                SELECT
                    b.id
                FROM
                    "DocumentBom" b
                WHERE
                    b."documentId" = d.id
                ORDER BY
                    b."createdAt" ASC
                LIMIT 1
            ) db ON d."fileType" = 'docx'
            WHERE
                d.id = $1
            LIMIT 1
